# GigExecs

GigExecs is a premium network connecting organizations with vetted senior professionals for advisory, fractional, interim, and project-based engagements.

## Key terms

- Fractional executive: A senior leader engaged part-time for strategic or operational leadership.
- Interim leadership: Temporary executive placement during transitions.
- Independent consultant: A senior professional engaged for specific projects or advisory work.

## Key public URLs

- Home: https://gigexecs.com/
- Clients: https://gigexecs.com/clients
- Professionals: https://gigexecs.com/professionals
- How it works: https://gigexecs.com/how-it-works
- About: https://gigexecs.com/about
- Help: https://gigexecs.com/help
- Blog: https://gigexecs.com/blog
